items.title: Bitcoin ETFs see renewed inflows after three weeks of outflows
items.summary: Bitcoin spot ETFs recorded $420M in net inflows on Thursday, breaking a three-week streak of outflows. BlackRock's IBIT led the charge with $280M alone.
items.whyItMatters: Signals renewed institutional conviction and may indicate a floor has been established for BTC around $68K.

items.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5 with real-time reasoning capabilities
items.summary: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5 with native real-time reasoning, multimodal input processing, and a 1M token context window. Available to enterprise customers first.
items.whyItMatters: Represents the largest capability jump since GPT-4. Enterprise adoption could accelerate across legal, finance, and healthcare sectors.

items.title: EU passes comprehensive AI regulation framework
items.summary: The European Parliament approved the AI Act with new compliance requirements for high-risk AI systems. Companies have 12 months to comply.
items.whyItMatters: Sets global precedent for AI governance. US-based AI companies will need EU-compliant versions of their products.

items.title: Ethereum completes Pectra upgrade, gas fees drop 40%
items.summary: Ethereum's Pectra upgrade went live, reducing average gas fees from $2.40 to $1.44 and improving validator efficiency by 25%.
items.whyItMatters: Makes Ethereum more competitive against Solana and L2s for everyday transactions. Could drive DeFi activity back to mainnet.

items.title: Apple acquires edge AI startup for $2B
items.summary: Apple acquired DarwinAI, a startup specializing in on-device AI inference, for $2B. The deal signals Apple's commitment to local AI processing.
items.whyItMatters: Positions Apple to run advanced AI models directly on iPhone/Mac without cloud dependency, a key privacy advantage.

items.title: Solana TVL hits all-time high as memecoin activity surges
items.summary: Solana's total value locked reached $14.2B driven primarily by memecoin trading on pump.fun and Jupiter. SOL price up 12% this week.
items.whyItMatters: While TVL is up, the quality of activity matters. Memecoin-driven TVL is volatile and may not sustain.

items.title: CrowdStrike discovers new state-sponsored cyber campaign targeting energy sector
items.summary: CrowdStrike identified a sophisticated APT campaign targeting US energy infrastructure. The attack uses novel supply chain compromise techniques.
items.whyItMatters: Critical infrastructure attacks are escalating. Expect increased government cybersecurity spending and stricter compliance requirements.

items.title: New crypto project claims to 'revolutionize' social media with tokens
items.summary: A new project called SocialFi Pro launched with $50M in VC funding, promising to tokenize social interactions. Vague whitepaper with aggressive marketing.
items.whyItMatters: Another iteration of the SocialFi narrative without clear product-market fit. High VC valuation without user traction is a red flag.

items.title: NVIDIA reports record datacenter revenue driven by AI demand
items.summary: NVIDIA's datacenter segment posted $35B in quarterly revenue, up 80% YoY. CEO Jensen Huang highlighted 'insatiable demand' for AI compute.
items.whyItMatters: Confirms AI infrastructure spending is not slowing down. Key signal for the entire AI hardware and cloud compute supply chain.

items.title: SEC delays decision on Ethereum ETF options trading
items.summary: The SEC pushed its decision on ETH ETF options to June, citing the need for additional public comment. Market reaction was muted.
items.whyItMatters: Expected delay — not a rejection. Options on ETH ETFs would significantly increase institutional trading strategies available.

items.title: Cloudflare launches AI-powered zero-trust network access
items.summary: Cloudflare introduced AI-driven anomaly detection for its Zero Trust platform, analyzing network behavior patterns in real-time to detect threats.
items.whyItMatters: Combines two hot sectors — AI and cybersecurity. Could pressure legacy security vendors to accelerate AI integration.

items.title: Celebrity launches another NFT collection promising 'exclusive access'
items.summary: A major celebrity launched a 10K NFT collection on Ethereum with vague promises of metaverse access and concert tickets. Floor price dropping fast.
items.whyItMatters: Celebrity NFT projects have a 95%+ failure rate. This is textbook noise — no utility, no roadmap, pure hype extraction.

items.title: Fed officials signal slower easing path as inflation lingers
items.summary: Minutes and commentary from the latest FOMC cycle pointed to fewer cuts than markets priced for H2, with emphasis on services inflation stickiness.
items.whyItMatters: Liquidity and discount-rate narratives drive risk assets; a higher-for-longer bias weighs on high-duration tech and speculative crypto.
items.impact: Headwind for risk sentiment until data turns

executiveBrief: Bitcoin ETFs broke a 3-week outflow streak with $420M in net inflows — institutional interest is returning.
OpenAI launched GPT-5 with real-time reasoning and 1M context window — largest capability jump since GPT-4.
EU approved comprehensive AI regulation — 12-month compliance deadline for high-risk systems.
NVIDIA posted $35B datacenter revenue (+80% YoY) — AI infrastructure demand shows no signs of slowing.
Ethereum Pectra upgrade live — gas fees down 40%, improving mainnet competitiveness.

watchItems.title: Federal Reserve Interest Rate Decision
watchItems.description: FOMC meeting outcome could impact risk assets across tech and crypto.

watchItems.title: Apple WWDC 2026
watchItems.description: Expected to unveil on-device AI features leveraging DarwinAI acquisition.

watchItems.title: SEC Crypto Roundtable
watchItems.description: New SEC chair to outline stance on crypto asset classification.

watchItems.title: Google Q1 2026 Earnings
watchItems.description: Focus on Gemini adoption metrics and cloud AI revenue growth.

watchItems.title: Bitcoin Halving Anniversary Analysis
watchItems.description: One year post-halving — historical cycle analysis suggests key inflection point.
